_comment: Heavenly Fate Sect Main Grounds (天运宗主殿) — the main sect grounds of the Heavenly Fate Sect, powerhouse sect of the Zhao Country region (CANON_RI_COMPLETE_WORLD.md L23). Distinct from the existing heavenly_fate_outpost (which is a small forward camp); this is the grand main sect with fate-reading towers and assembly halls. Stand-in: plains village (grand). Final: fate-reading observatory towers, grand assembly halls, fate-qi gathering arrays, ancestor halls.
